name: Central Park East
description: Come play pickleball at Central Park East in La Vista, NE! There are 3 outdoor concrete and hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Gretna Crossing YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Gretna Crossing YMCA in Gretna, NE! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Halleck Park
description: Halleck Park is a place to play pickleball in Papillion, NE. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Lied Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lied Activity Center in Bellevue, NE! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, wheelchair accessibility, restrooms, locker rooms, and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Pickleball on Tuesdays is a $5 drop-in fee regardless of membership status.

name: Midwest Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Midwest Pickleball Club in Papillion, NE! There are 14 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and food. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Papillion Landing
description: Come play pickleball at Papillion Landing in Papillion, NE! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Sarpy Community YMCA
description: Sarpy Community YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Papillion, NE. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Smash Park La Vista
description: Smash Park La Vista is a place to play pickleball in La Vista, NE. There are 6 hard and acrylic courts. 2 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, food, water, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Fee required — Peak pricing ($39/hour) on weekends and after 4 PM on weekdays. Non-peak pricing ($19) before 4 PM on weekdays. Outdoor courts are $19/hour or $10/hour in Polar Pickleball Season.

name: Tara Hills Park
description: Tara Hills Park is a place to play pickleball in Papillion, NE. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
